title: Fix refinery UX issues per Yuki review

log.context: Fix refinery UX issues per Yuki review

All 7 fixes implemented and pushed in `/mnt/data/hello-world/refinery.html`: 1. **Page header** -- Added `

The Refinery

` with description "Vote on designs for BigClungus personas -- sprites, avatars, and more. Results shape the world." 2. **Vote feedback** -- `castVote()` now disables the button immediately, shows "Voting..." with a wait cursor, then on success calls `showToast('Vote recorded')`. On failure, re-enables the button and shows an error toast. 3. **Sprite error handling** ...(truncated)
